title: Befuddled
description: An all purpose pack centered around socializing, with key notes for exploration, mining, combat and self expression. Show off to the server your arts, and take down massive enemies. Share the loot and automate it all!
body:
Befuddled is a social, all purpose modpack aimed to add many facets to gameplay. From the adventurers, to the miners, to the creatives, even automators, there is something for anyone.

Players can take a focus on exploration, looking for sructures and dungeons, gaining loot and experiencing a more sophisticated combat. Or, go mining, and find interesting underground vaults or random rewards. Alternatively, players can advance, automating processes, and even going to space! If you are the type of player who likes to express themselves artistically, you can make your own music, or even art, making unique cosmetic items for yourself and others.

No matter what type of player you are, there is likely something here for you. just be careful not to become.

Befuddled.
